item.title: The Nature of Hallucinations
item.description: What if the same mechanism that makes AI hallucinate is also the source of its creativity? Discover why language models confidently produce false answers, why today’s fixes only scratch the surface, and how teaching machines to say “I don’t know” could ignite the next revolution in AI.
